payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Partial foreground view of a bed with a light-gray and beige striped bedspread and a matching pillow near the head; the wooden headboard is partially visible at the left and the left side of the mattress is occluded by a lamp — bed surface appears made and flat; estimated distance about 0.8 m from camera.
